name: GILEAD SCIENCES, INC.
summary: Gilead Sciences, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company that develops and commercializes medicines across therapeutic areas including HIV, viral hepatitis, oncology, and inflammatory diseases. Key products include BIKTARVY and DESCOVY (HIV), VEKLURY (COVID-19), EPCLUSA and HARVONI (hepatitis C), HEPCLUDEX (hepatitis B), TRODELVY and YESCARTA and TECARTUS (oncology), and LIVDELZI (liver disease).
